blocks.text: Quick note to close the loop from Daniel Valenzuela's message. The core positioning statement is locked, and I have folded your last round of edits into the map, so what you have now is current.
The only item still moving is the proof point on the operations side. Once your team confirms the figure, that claim is finished and the {{fact:f:E-2017-001.client}} map is complete for this phase.

For the working session, could you let me know who should join and whether mornings or afternoons are easier? I will send a short agenda ahead of time so we stay focused. Daniel and I will come ready to walk each section and take decisions in the room.
